summary: 过去 24 小时 AI 新闻按技术、模型、商业、投资、安全与监管聚合。页面优先展示影响力高、来源清晰、并且能解释后续产业意义的信号。

keylines.title: 商业是今日主轴
keylines.text: 过去 24 小时里，商业相关内容占比最高，说明媒体报道和社交讨论正在向这一方向集中。

keylines.title: Grok / xAI带动 X 讨论
keylines.text: X 热点更偏实时体验和争议观点，适合用来捕捉模型、产品和安全事件的早期信号。

keylines.title: 基础设施仍是深层变量
keylines.text: 芯片、数据中心、电力和推理成本会持续决定 AI 产品能否从发布会走向规模化商业。

stories.title: Dave Eggers told OpenAI staff that ChatGPT was ‘silencing an entire generation’
stories.summary: Last year, Sam Altman invited author Dave Eggers to give a talk to around 200 OpenAI staffers. The man has written countless novels, screenplays, pieces of journalism, started McSweeney's, and founded multiple schools and nonpr...
stories.analysis: 这条新闻更像模型供应链信号：OpenAI 与 Microsoft 的产品绑定会影响企业办公入口、模型议价权和未来替换成本。

stories.title: Kimi: Threat or menace?
stories.summary: Chinese company Moonshot AI released a new version of its Kimi model this week, prompting concern about "full AI communism."
stories.analysis: 模型新闻需要结合价格、延迟、上下文、工具调用和真实任务稳定性评估，单一榜单不足以判断产品竞争力。

stories.title: Neil Rimer thinks the AI money is coming back out
stories.summary: Neil Rimer, the venture capitalist who co-founded Index Ventures, predicts the historic wealth AI is generating in Silicon Valley will have to be redistributed, voluntarily or involuntarily.
stories.analysis: 这条新闻属于资本与基础设施信号，后续重点是投入规模、成本压力和真实需求是否匹配。

stories.title: Vertu wants executives to pay $6,880 for an AI agent — here’s how it actually performs
stories.summary: From AI workflows to battery life and security, here's what it's really like to live with Vertu's luxury foldable every day.
stories.analysis: 安全与真实性议题正在从原则讨论进入可执行工具，媒体、平台和企业需要更快识别合成内容与自动化攻击。

stories.title: Agility Robotics plants its flag in Tesla’s backyard
stories.summary: Agility is opening a new training center for its Digit robots in Fremont, California.
stories.analysis: 这类观点把 AGI 路线之争重新拉回训练数据和世界模型问题：只扩大文本模型，未必能补足物理世界经验。

stories.title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
stories.summary: Databricks has remade its image into an AI company and has published research on the cost savings of open weight AI models for coding.
stories.analysis: AI 编程工具竞争正在进入大型迁移和多步骤修复场景，差异会体现在代码库理解、权限控制和可审计输出。

stories.title: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Maximizes Intelligence per Dollar for Post-Training Workloads — a Key Metric for Agentic AI
stories.summary: Lowest cost per token from extreme codesign maximizes intelligence per dollar for post-training in the agentic era.
stories.analysis: AI 编程工具竞争正在进入大型迁移和多步骤修复场景，差异会体现在代码库理解、权限控制和可审计输出。

stories.title: AI-driven memory crunch jolts India’s smartphone market
stories.summary: India's smartphone slowdown highlights how the AI boom is reshaping consumer electronics, from pricing and demand to corporate strategy.
stories.analysis: 这条新闻属于商业化信号，后续重点是它是否进入高频工作流，并形成稳定付费或留存。

stories.title: Patreon stops asking AI bots not to scrape — and starts blocking them
stories.summary: Patreon is strengthening its defenses against AI scraping by working with Cloudflare to block bots that train AI models on creators’ content without permission. The move marks a shift away from relying on websites using robots.
stories.analysis: 机器人方向的关键是用低成本数据补足真实世界采集瓶颈，游戏、仿真和交互轨迹可能成为物理 AI 的训练燃料。

stories.title: TikTok is testing an AI likeness detection tool
stories.summary: TikTok is starting to test an opt-in tool that scans for AI likenesses and lets creators report them to the company, as spotted by social media consultant Matt Navarra.
stories.analysis: 这条新闻属于商业化信号，后续重点是它是否进入高频工作流，并形成稳定付费或留存。

stories.title: How Apple’s big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI’s IPO plans
stories.summary: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI last Friday, and it’s not messing around. The complaint alleges a pattern of misconduct reaching all the way up to OpenAI’s chief hardware officer and claims more than 400 form...
stories.analysis: 这条新闻更像模型供应链信号：OpenAI 与 Microsoft 的产品绑定会影响企业办公入口、模型议价权和未来替换成本。

stories.title: Why the first GPU financiers are turning to inference chips in a $400 million deal
stories.summary: A $400 million chip-backed loan points to the next wave of AI infrastructure deals.
stories.analysis: 芯片、模型套件和 Agent 编排框架一起出现时，重点不是单点性能，而是端到端推理成本、部署效率和生态绑定。

stories.title: Apple’s plot to crush OpenAI
stories.summary: Apple is suing OpenAI. The complaint is readable and intense, as these things often are, though many experts seem to think many of the allegations are just the ways things are done.
stories.analysis: 模型新闻需要结合价格、延迟、上下文、工具调用和真实任务稳定性评估，单一榜单不足以判断产品竞争力。

stories.title: A scorecard for the AI age
stories.summary: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.
stories.analysis: AI 投资回报讨论正在从愿景转向财务验证，企业会更关注单位成本、流程改造深度和可量化生产率提升。

xTrends.signal: 模型能力、价格和开发者可用性是主要讨论点，很多帖子直接拿它和 OpenAI、Anthropic 对比。
讨论集中在新模型分层、企业访问节奏、推理质量和产品体验是否有实质提升。
安全研究者和 CISO 圈层关注 AI Agent 是否会把攻击链自动化到新的速度。
投资者讨论长期数据中心租约、电力容量和 AI 基建股是否进入过热区间。
手机厂商把 AI 拉回端侧入口之争，争议点是功能是否真能改变日常使用。
创作者圈层继续测试视频生成、图像模型和工作流自动化，版权与真实性问题伴随升温。

briefings.title: 从热度看真实优先级
briefings.text: 模型发布仍最容易引爆讨论，但企业最终会按稳定性、成本、权限集成和数据安全来选择供应商。

briefings.title: 安全窗口继续缩短
briefings.text: AI Agent 让攻击链更自动化，防守重点需要前移到身份、权限、工具调用和数据访问异常。

briefings.title: 资本开支影响模型竞争
briefings.text: 算力合同、芯片供应和数据中心成本正在成为 AI 公司竞争力的一部分。

watchlist: OpenAI、NVIDIA 是否发布新的 API、价格或企业访问策略
X 高热讨论是否被主流媒体确认，还是停留在圈层争议
AI 数据中心和芯片供应是否出现新的融资、电力或交付约束
监管机构是否把 AI 安全、版权、金融建议或出口限制推进到执法层面
